test.title: English level test
test.subtitle: Answer one by one — get your CEFR level at the end
test.intro_desc: A free test that places your English on the international CEFR scale — from A1 (beginner) to C2 (proficiency). Questions appear one at a time. Leave a request for lessons at the end.
